ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Geroge appeared by thelephone for Bank of America.

Mr. George stated that the "agreement of property of spouses" was found later after they filed the first petition. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
